name: Coast To Coast Pawn
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Clearwater, FL offering collateral-based loans, merchandise buying/selling, and gold services since 2014.
description_long:
Coast to Coast Pawn is a family-owned and operated pawn shop established in 2014, located in Clearwater, Florida. The business positions itself as a straightforward alternative to traditional lending, with a staff that includes a Certified Gemologist and an emphasis on honest, dignified service. The company operates during standard retail hours (Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 10am-5pm) and can be reached at 727-461-0498.

The shop offers multiple revenue streams beyond traditional pawn loans. Core services include collateral-based short-term loans on items of value, merchandise buying and selling (jewelry, electronics, tools, sporting equipment, musical instruments), gold and precious metals purchasing, jewelry repair services, and both handgun and rifle sales with Federal Firearms License compliance.

Cost to Coast differentiates itself through staffing expertise (Certified Gemologist on-site), a price-matching commitment on gold purchases, and a transparent loan structure where interest payments allow concurrent principal paydown. The loan approval process reportedly takes only minutes. The company frames pawn lending as a legitimate financial solution for emergency expenses including auto repair, job loss, medical bills, and unexpected household costs.

As a pawn shop, Coast to Coast serves a specific niche: consumers needing immediate cash against collateral who may not qualify for traditional credit products. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are short-term solutions requiring item forfeiture if not repaid, and the company does not disclose interest rates or loan terms on its website. Customers should be aware that while the business emphasizes reputation and integrity, pawn loans inherently involve risk of losing personal property.
address: 2054 Gulf to Bay Blvd, Clearwater, FL 33765

company_info.headquarters: 2054 Gulf to Bay Blvd, Clearwater, FL 33765

pros: Staff includes a Certified Gemologist, providing expertise for jewelry and precious metals evaluation
Explicit price-matching promise on gold purchases—will match or exceed competitor bids
Fast loan process taking only minutes from application to funding
Diverse merchandise selection (jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, antiques, artwork)
Allows partial principal paydown with interest payments, reducing total loan balance
Gun sales with Federal Firearms License compliance and ability to receive shipped firearms
Professional jewelry repair services offered on-site
cons: No interest rates, APR, or loan term details disclosed on website—borrowers cannot comparison shop
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays, weekday closing at 6pm) may not suit all customers
Pawn loans require physical collateral surrender, creating risk of permanent item loss if loan defaults
No information on loan approval criteria, maximum loan amounts, or renewal/extension policies
Single physical location in Clearwater, FL limits accessibility for non-local customers
best_for: Customers with items of value needing immediate cash for emergencies without credit checks
People interested in buying discounted electronics, jewelry, tools, or sporting equipment
Those with broken or unwanted precious metals, gold, or diamonds seeking fair-value purchases
Gun owners and hunters seeking to buy or sell firearms through an FFL-compliant dealer
diagnosis: Coast to Coast Pawn is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have items of value to pledge as collateral and cannot or prefer not to use traditional credit products. The critical caveat is that no interest rates or loan terms are disclosed online; borrowers must visit in-person or call to understand the actual cost of borrowing, and should understand that defaulting on a pawn loan results in permanent loss of the pledged item.
services: Merchandise buying and selling (jewelry, electronics, watches, tools, antiques, musical instruments)
Gold and precious metals purchasing at competitive rates
Handgun and rifle sales with Federal Firearms License compliance
Firearm receiving agent services for guns shipped from licensed dealers
Professional jewelry repair and refinishing services
Item trade-in or sale for fast cash
eBay store inventory browsing and purchase
